title: MENTAL HEALTH AND CONNECTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH AND CONNECTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, group, and family counseling; psychiatry services/medication management; advocacy; case management; substance use disorder counseling; and crisis intervention. The Connection program provides these same services to deaf or hard of hearing individuals and their family members. Remote video conferencing, email, instant messaging, and information and referral to housing assistance, emergency food, and employment are also available. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Mental health services: Unresticted Connection program: Deaf or hard of hearing individuals and their family members Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-7526 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by primary care provider at West Salem Clinic or Total Health Community Clinic FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan (Medicaid), Medicare,Tricare, accepts most private insurance, and offers a sliding fee scale based on income and family size for those without insurance, and those with minimal insurance coverage. No one is turned away for an inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: One block north of Main Street. Three blocks east of Highway 99. Services: Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Psychiatric Medication Services Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC
